name: BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications
notes: This Building Block identifies flows that have been identified as Instant Messaging communications.
bb_references: BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when the flow matches Application is Chat
when the flow bias is inbound, outbound
TD_list: APPLY BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when the flow matches Application is Chat
AND NOT when the flow bias is inbound, outbound
